tasks.subject: Task 1: Stop leaking stableId from the daily leaderboard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** getDailyLeaderboard returns only { chainLength, name } per row; stableId never reaches any client.

**Files:**
- Modify: server/systems/dailySystem.js (getDailyLeaderboard return map, ~lines 258-262)
- Test: server/systems/dailySystem.test.js (append describe block)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Every returned row has exactly chainLength and name; 'stableId' in row === false
- Name join + score-desc ordering unchanged
- Full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/systems/dailySystem.test.js -t "getDailyLeaderboard" then npx jest --silent

**Steps:** TDD — write failing no-stableId test; remove `stableId: e.value,` from the return map; run test; run full suite; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/dailySystem.js", "server/systems/dailySystem.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/dailySystem.test.js -t \"getDailyLeaderboard\" && npx jest --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no stableId key in any returned row", "name/order unchanged", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fail-fast on missing/weak ADMIN_SECRET
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Missing or <32-char ADMIN_SECRET refuses to boot with a fatal log; rule unit-tested and documented in .env.example.

**Files:**
- Create: server/validateAdminSecret.js
- Create: server/admin-secret.test.js
- Modify: server.js (require + fatal check after the TMDB guard, ~after line 242)
- Modify: .env.example (append documented ADMIN_SECRET)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- validateAdminSecret: error string for undefined/''/non-string/31-char; null for 32-char
- server.js logger.fatal + process.exit(1) on failure, mirroring TMDB guard
- .env.example documents required 32-char minimum
- Full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/admin-secret.test.js -v then npx jest --silent

**Steps:** TDD — failing unit test; create server/validateAdminSecret.js; wire fatal check into server.js; update .env.example; run; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/validateAdminSecret.js", "server/admin-secret.test.js", "server.js", ".env.example"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/admin-secret.test.js -v && npx jest --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guard rejects undefined/''/non-string/31-char, accepts 32-char", "fatal boot check wired mirroring TMDB", ".env.example documents the requirement", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dedicated admin rate limiter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /api/admin/* protected by a strict per-IP limiter (5/15min) independent of the global limiter; 6th in-window request → 429.

**Files:**
- Create: server/adminLimiter.js
- Create: server/admin-ratelimit.test.js
- Modify: server.js (require + app.use('/api/admin', adminLimiter) between express.static line 104 and first admin route line 106)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 5 sequential stubbed /api/admin requests succeed; 6th in-window → 429
- Auth-failing requests still consume budget
- Limiter registered by path prefix BEFORE any admin route
- Full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/admin-ratelimit.test.js -v then npx jest --silent

**Steps:** TDD — failing supertest 429 test against the real exported limiter; create server/adminLimiter.js; wire into server.js; run; commit.

**Note:** blockedBy Task 2 — both modify server.js; serialize so patches stay clean and reviewable.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/adminLimiter.js", "server/admin-ratelimit.test.js", "server.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/admin-ratelimit.test.js -v && npx jest --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 ok then 6th 429", "auth failures consume budget", "registered before admin routes", "full suite green"]}
```
